title: Enhanced Vanilla
description: Modpack containing new biomes and some performance tweaks.
body:
# Main
This is the modpack that tries to enhance vanilla minecraft without being heavy on performance.
## Fabric
Main advantage of the modpack is being Fabric based, adn thanks to that the modpack  contains one of the best performance mods, Sodium.
## Revamped biomes
By using Cliff under the tree modpack adds new flavour to vanilla biomes without making new ones.
## New sounds
Thanks to Sounds mod Atmosfera, Presence Footsteps and Drip Sounds you can immerse yourself in the miencraft world.
## Quality of life mods
Controlify and many more.
## Shader compability
Working shaders with create mod that can enchance visuals.
